commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual review is required because the PR has the protected maintainer label and the warning semantics need maintainer acceptance, not an automated repair.; Cleared: The diff adds no dependency, workflow, package, secret-handling, or code-execution surface; the reviewed changes are gateway diagnostics, docs, and tests. (sha=14c2d29208a29459f1aa83401e02cbc2678247a9)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes gateway probe/status warning generation to dedupe reachable targets by gateway self identity, adds a process-level self `instanceId`, and updates gateway docs plus regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +216, Docs +2. Total +273 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds both SSH tunnel and configured remote targets, then warns when `reachable.length > 1` without an identity check. I did not run a live failing setup in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is required because the PR has the protected `maintainer` label and the warning semantics need maintainer acceptance, not an automated repair.

target.title: fix(gateway): dedupe probe warnings by gateway identity
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #69135 by suppressing `multiple_gateways` only when reachable probe targets report the same provable gateway self identity.
- Gateway self presence now exposes a process-level `instanceId`; same-host/same-config ambiguity without a process/device identity remains conservative and still warns.
- SSH tunnel, proxy/TLS URL, and configured remote URL can resolve to the same gateway even when transport ports differ.
- Docs and regression tests now describe distinct, same, and identity-ambiguous gateway cases.
- No config surface or plugin API surface changed.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/system-presence.test.ts src/infra/system-presence.version.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files, 22 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/system-presence.ts docs/cli/gateway.md docs/gateway/index.md docs/gateway/multiple-gateways.md docs/gateway/troubleshooting.md src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts` -> passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/infra/system-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts` -> 0 warnings, 0 errors
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`
- `/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main` -> no blocking regressions found
- `git log --show-signature --format="%h %G? %s" origin/main..HEAD` -> all 7 commits have good signatures

Rebased onto current `main` (`144405e562789ace9fb51363c4ed08de5de48d30`) for Dependency Guard. All 7 commits remain signed.

target.title: fix(gateway): dedupe probe warnings by gateway identity
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #69135 by suppressing `multiple_gateways` only when reachable probe targets report the same provable gateway self identity.
- Gateway self presence now exposes a process-level `instanceId`; same-host/same-config ambiguity without a process/device identity remains conservative and still warns.
- SSH tunnel, proxy/TLS URL, and configured remote URL can resolve to the same gateway even when transport ports differ.
- Docs and regression tests now describe distinct, same, and identity-ambiguous gateway cases.
- No config surface or plugin API surface changed.
